description:
Bridge the admin dashboard's 17-dimension health scorer with the wc-tools MCP server's health tools.

**Outbound**: Push admin's rich scores into wc-tools history format so all MCP consumers get real data
**Inbound**: Pull MCP-exclusive data (branch diffs, CEM a11y profiles) into admin dashboard
**Foundation**: Extract reusable MCP client from mcp-probe.ts

See plan: ~/.claude/plans/humble-leaping-kettle.md
title: Epic: Health Scoring Integration (Admin ↔ wc-tools MCP)
